initial_prompt: In the project at {workdir}, this rust build_error fails: Rust type/argument errors — enable backtrace and clean incremental. Reproduce the failure with `CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 RUST_BACKTRACE=1 RUSTC="$(rustup which rustc)" "$(rustup which cargo)" check`, diagnose the root cause by reading the project files, and apply a fix so that same command exits 0.

success_criteria.fix_command_test: cd {workdir} && CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 RUST_BACKTRACE=1 RUSTC="$(rustup which rustc)" "$(rustup which cargo)" check
